---
title: "events.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/gateway/routes/ws/events.ts"
loc: 38
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.15
style_score: 4.00
intel_score: 6.21
overall_score: 5.79
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)

## ⛩️ API Gateways
- `[GET] /connect`


## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FastifyInstance](file://fastify)
- [FastifyPluginAsync](file://fastify)
- [WebSocket](file://ws)
- [EventManager](file://../../../core/EventManager.js)

### Exports
- `wsRoutes`
- `appId`
- `eventManager`
- `ws`
- `interval`
- `wsRoutes`
